title: Error handling cleanups, and drop pkg/errors
body:
This is motivated by https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/14784 ’s effort to remove pkg/errors.

Also includes other related cleanups, see individual commit messages for details.

comments.body: Note to self: There’s probably a more reliable argument as to whether replacing `errors.Cause` is safe (if we know whether the type we are looking for implements `Cause()` or `Unwrap()`).
